title: Junior Revenue Manager at Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates!
